The '''Type I Light Duty Space Defense Platform''' was built by [[Rendili StarDrive/Legends|Rendili StarDrive]].

==Characteristics==
The 250 meter long [[Space station/Legends|station]] was designed for civilian use, having room to accommodate 100 passengers. The facility could carry 50 metric tons of cargo and could hold enough supplies to run for six months.<ref name="HS" />

{{Station-stub}}
